note: Bounded source fixture for Prize Pack evidence v2. Series 4-6 use JustInBasil structured set lists. Series 7-8 use official checklist PDFs.

evidence_tiers.summary: Official Play! Pokemon gallery pages, official card lists, and official checklist PDFs.
Trusted structured aggregators with card-level numbering, including JustInBasil-style set lists.
Community corroboration such as multiple independent listings or bounded compare audits.
Weak evidence: single source, inconsistent naming, or no external checklist corroboration.

temporal_gate_notes: Series 4-8 are fully covered in this fixture.
Rows whose base set first became eligible in Series 4 or later can be evaluated for uniqueness without guessing.
Rows whose base set could have appeared in Series 1-3 remain partial-coverage unless separately evidenced.
